titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 77: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 77. (A.R. No. 170 of 1904.) TIRUVAKKARAI, VILLUPPURAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: At the northern entrance of the first prākāra of Chandramauḷīśvara temple.

This records that two ashṭakam (block) of land obtained in exchange for Āḻiyūr were allotted in four shares each to those persons who performed worship in the two temples of Kaṟṟaḷi-Paramasvāmi and Vishṇubhaṭṭālagar of Tiruvakkarai in Tribhuvanamādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam respectively and also to those who played on musical instruments at the time of śrībali service as uvachchappaṅgu. The peruṅguṟi perumakkaḷ undertook to carry out this charity under the supervision of Perumāṉ of Kuṟumpurandi. They also had allotted four vēli of land, a big well, kitchen garden (kollai nilam) in Amukkuṭṭam and another plot of land under irrigation from Tiruvināḷ-ēri (lake) at Tiruvakkarai to the above two gods.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 240.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .
kopparakesaripan
markki yāṇṭu pa
ttāvatu śrītri
bhuvaṉamahāde
vicaturvetimaṅ
kalattu tiruva
kkarai kaṟṟaḷi para
masvāmikaḷum
viṣṇupaṭṭālaka
rum Āḻiyūr
kkāka nilavaḻi
parivarttaṉai
yāl peṟṟu
ṭaiya Iraṇṭu
Aṣṭakattum
yiraṇṭu śrīko
yilum A
rccikka Uṭai
ya kulaṅkiḻārka
ḷ kaṇṭi nilakaṇ
ṭiyum nākaṉ kaṟṟaḷi
yum kumāra(su)svāmi peru
māṉum kaṟṟaḷi cetta
paṭṭaṉum
ceyak kaṭavā
rāka Arcc(ā)ṉā
bhoga paṅku
nālum śrī
pali koṭṭum U
vacca paṅku nālu
mcantri(ntrā)titta
vaṟ niṟkka kuṟu
mpuranti peru
māṉ kaṇkā
ṇiyoṭum ci
lālekai ce
yvittu kuṭu
ttom pe
ruṅkuṟip peru
makkaḷḷom
tiruvakkaraiyi
l Ūraka nilattil
Idevarkaḷu
kku Iruvarkku
teṉ kaḻaniyi
l nilam nālu
veliyum pe
ruṅ keṇiyum
Amukkuṭṭat
til kollai
nilamum tiruvinā
ḷ Eri kiḻ nilamu
m .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 77 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
